title: Pastinaca brevivittata

Pastinaca brevivittata is native to Asia and is often found in mountainous regions. Its classification is used in botanical research to understand its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
uses: Pastinaca brevivittata is reported to be used in traditional medicine.
